summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Manager & PIN System Phase 1. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%) and all frontend UI tests passed. Fixed a bug where has_manager_pin was not being returned correctly in GET /api/businesses/my/workers endpoint.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/businesses/me/pin/status returns correct status - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/businesses/me/pin with valid 4-digit PIN - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/businesses/me/pin with valid 6-digit PIN - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/businesses/me/pin rejects 3-digit PIN - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/businesses/me/pin rejects 7-digit PIN - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/businesses/me/pin rejects non-numeric PIN - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/businesses/me/pin/verify with correct PIN - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/businesses/me/pin/verify rejects wrong PIN - PASSED
Backend: PUT /api/businesses/my/workers/{id}/manager designates manager - PASSED
Backend: Manager designation fills in default permissions - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses/my/workers returns is_manager and has_manager_pin - PASSED
Backend: PUT /api/businesses/my/workers/{id}/manager/permissions updates permissions - PASSED
Backend: Update permissions for non-manager returns 404 - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/businesses/my/workers/{id}/manager/pin sets manager PIN - PASSED
Backend: Manager PIN validation rejects invalid PIN - PASSED
Backend: Set PIN for non-manager returns 404 - PASSED
Backend: DELETE /api/businesses/my/workers/{id}/manager removes manager role - PASSED
Backend: Remove manager from non-existent worker returns 404 - PASSED
Frontend: Business login and navigation to Team tab - PASSED
Frontend: Owner PIN section shows correct status (PIN configurado) - PASSED
Frontend: Owner PIN modal opens with inputs and validation - PASSED
Frontend: PIN mismatch message shown when PINs don't match - PASSED
Frontend: PIN match message shown when PINs match - PASSED
Frontend: Save PIN button disabled when PINs don't match - PASSED
Frontend: Worker card shows 'Designar como gerente' button - PASSED
Frontend: Manager permissions modal shows grouped permissions (CITAS, CLIENTES, NEGOCIO) - PASSED
Frontend: Permission switches toggle correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Designate manager button calls API and refreshes list - PASSED
Frontend: Manager badge appears after designation - PASSED
Frontend: Manager action buttons (Permisos, PIN, Quitar) appear - PASSED
Frontend: Edit permissions modal opens with current permissions - PASSED
Frontend: Manager PIN modal opens and saves PIN - PASSED
Frontend: Remove manager button removes role after confirmation - PASSED
Frontend: 'Designar como gerente' button reappears after removing manager - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in GET /api/businesses/my/workers endpoint - was not setting has_manager_pin field (line 2002-2004 in server.py)

All permission groups correctly implemented: CITAS (complete_bookings, reschedule_bookings, cancel_bookings), CLIENTES (block_clients, view_client_data), NEGOCIO (edit_services, edit_profile, view_reports)
PIN validation correctly enforces 4-6 digit numeric requirement on both frontend and backend
Manager designation correctly merges provided permissions with defaults
Remove manager correctly clears is_manager, manager_pin_hash, manager_permissions, manager_designated_at, manager_designated_by
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test worker 'Test Worker Duration'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manager & PIN System Phase 1 is fully implemented and tested. Key points: (1) Owner PIN section in Team tab shows status and allows setting/changing PIN, (2) Workers can be designated as managers with custom permissions grouped into CITAS, CLIENTES, NEGOCIO, (3) Managers show badge and have action buttons for Permisos, PIN, Quitar, (4) All API endpoints work correctly: /me/pin, /me/pin/status, /me/pin/verify, /my/workers/{id}/manager, /my/workers/{id}/manager/permissions, /my/workers/{id}/manager/pin. Bug fixed: has_manager_pin was not being returned in GET /my/workers endpoint.

bug_fixed.description: GET /api/businesses/my/workers was not returning has_manager_pin field
bug_fixed.fix: Added loop to set has_manager_pin = bool(w.get('manager_pin_hash')) for each worker before returning
